rationale: Re-running the three FrontierScience-Olympiad sonnet timeouts to recover missing rows would not affect the headline finding (schema-only +57 pp dominates, model-only -1 pp within sampling noise), and the new judge-calibration task t0019 reuses the same 20-row v2-sonnet sample without those three rows. The cost of recovery exceeds its informational value. Rejecting after t0016 already demoted to low.
